parents.subject: LU-12380 llite/mds: WIP! piggy back open handle on DoM PW lock

commit.subject: LU-12380 llite: WIP Allow open lock converting.
commit.message:
LU-12380 llite: WIP Allow open lock converting.

This singles out open lock as another target for selective
bit cancel.
In reality we just need to test and find out the problems
with all the bits (Mike reports some HSM related problems?)
and make this fully featured.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Change-Id: I9f14f247de916c239e85bbf3ca362a01bd37103d
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
